findings.title: Evaluation set passes
findings.detail: All 10 R7.3 retrieval evaluation cases pass with zero authority violations.

findings.title: Lexical ranking remains coarse
findings.detail: Generic query words can bring in broad low-score results. This is acceptable for internal review but should be improved before teacher-facing use is widened.

findings.title: Target exercise chunking is too broad
findings.detail: The target-exercise source currently appears as one large chunk. Per-exercise chunks would improve precision.

recommended_conditions: Keep retrieval internal or clearly non-authoritative.
Preserve source path, authority level, and warning flags in all outputs.
Add per-target-exercise chunks before relying on target exercise retrieval for authoring decisions.
